requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Mains Voltage, Frequency, and Plug Type
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——市电电压、频率及插头类型
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——市電電壓、頻率及插頭類型

summary.en: Timor-Leste's electrical supply standard is 220–240 V AC at 50 Hz, consistent with the European and Australian/Pacific standard. The plug and socket situation is mixed: Type C (Europlug, two round pins) and Type I (Australian-style, two or three flat angled pins) are both widely used, reflecting the country's Portuguese colonial heritage and strong Australian influence from proximity and the UN/Australian-led INTERFET and UNTAET administrations. Type F (Schuko, with grounding side clips) is also found. Wireless and IoT devices with AC mains adapters sold or imported into Timor-Leste must operate safely at 220–240 V / 50 Hz. There is no dedicated Timorese electrical safety certification authority equivalent to Australia's RCM (ACMA/SAA) or the EU's CE mark. ANACOM accepts IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 safety test reports (from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories) as part of the type approval technical file for devices with AC power supplies. Products designed only for 100–120 V (US/Japan standard) are not compatible without a voltage converter.
summary.zh: 东帝汶的供电标准为220–240 V交流电、50 Hz，与欧洲及澳大利亚/太平洋标准一致。插头和插座情况较为复杂：C型（欧式插头，两个圆形插脚）和I型（澳大利亚式，两个或三个扁斜插脚）均普遍使用，体现了葡萄牙殖民历史以及与澳大利亚毗邻和联合国/澳大利亚主导的干预力量（INTERFET）及东帝汶过渡行政当局（UNTAET）管理的深厚影响。F型（德式插头，带侧面接地夹）也有使用。在东帝汶销售或进口的带交流电源适配器的无线及物联网设备，须在220–240 V / 50 Hz下安全运行。东帝汶没有专门的电气安全认证机构，相当于澳大利亚的RCM（ACMA/SAA）或欧盟的CE标志。ANACOM在带交流电源的设备型号认证技术文件中接受IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1安全测试报告（来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室）。仅为100–120 V（美国/日本标准）设计的产品，若不使用变压器则不兼容。
summary.zht: 東帝汶的供電標準為220–240 V交流電、50 Hz，與歐洲及澳大利亞/太平洋標準一致。插頭和插座情況較為複雜：C型（歐式插頭，兩個圓形插腳）和I型（澳大利亞式，兩個或三個扁斜插腳）均普遍使用，體現了葡萄牙殖民歷史以及與澳大利亞毗鄰和聯合國/澳大利亞主導的干預力量（INTERFET）及東帝汶過渡行政當局（UNTAET）管理的深厚影響。F型（德式插頭，帶側面接地夾）也有使用。在東帝汶銷售或進口的帶交流電源適配器的無線及物聯網裝置，須在220–240 V / 50 Hz下安全運行。東帝汶沒有專門的電氣安全認證機構，相當於澳大利亞的RCM（ACMA/SAA）或歐盟的CE標誌。ANACOM在帶交流電源的裝置型號認證技術文件中接受IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1安全測試報告（來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室）。僅為100–120 V（美國/日本標準）設計的產品，若不使用變壓器則不相容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety (current standard, supersedes IEC 60950-1 and IEC 60065)
IEC 60950-1 — Safety of information technology equipment (prior standard, test reports may still be accepted)
Timor-Leste electrical supply: 220–240 V AC / 50 Hz (national grid standard)
Plug types: Type C (IEC 60083 compatible) and Type I (AS/NZS 3112 compatible) — both common in Timor-Leste
Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications — Timor-Leste (technical file provisions)

summary.en: China's electrical supply is 220 V AC at 50 Hz — the same voltage and frequency as Timor-Leste. Chinese domestic plug standard is Type A (two flat parallel pins) and Type I (Australian-style, used in China as GB 2099.1 standard — two or three flat angled pins), which overlaps with Timor-Leste's common Type I sockets. For electrical safety, Chinese wireless and IoT devices with AC adapters require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1) from CNCA-authorised testing bodies. CCC is not recognised in Timor-Leste; however, IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 safety reports from ILAC-member laboratories (including CNAS-accredited labs) may be acceptable to ANACOM if they were conducted to IEC standards rather than only to GB standards.
summary.zh: 中国的供电标准为220 V交流电、50 Hz，与东帝汶的电压和频率相同。中国国内插头标准为A型（两个扁平平行插脚）和I型（澳大利亚式，在中国采用GB 2099.1标准——两个或三个扁斜插脚），与东帝汶常见的I型插座存在重叠。对于电气安全，中国带交流适配器的无线及物联网设备须取得CNCA授权检测机构依据GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1对标）颁发的CCC（中国强制认证）。CCC在东帝汶不被承认；但若ILAC成员实验室（包括CNAS认可实验室）出具的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1安全报告系依据IEC标准（而非仅依据GB标准）开展，则可能被ANACOM接受。
summary.zht: 中國的供電標準為220 V交流電、50 Hz，與東帝汶的電壓和頻率相同。中國國內插頭標準為A型（兩個扁平平行插腳）和I型（澳大利亞式，在中國採用GB 2099.1標準——兩個或三個扁斜插腳），與東帝汶常見的I型插座存在重疊。對於電氣安全，中國帶交流適配器的無線及物聯網裝置須取得CNCA授權檢測機構依據GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1對標）頒發的CCC（中國強制認證）。CCC在東帝汶不被承認；但若ILAC成員實驗室（包括CNAS認可實驗室）出具的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1安全報告系依據IEC標準（而非僅依據GB標準）開展，則可能被ANACOM接受。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA mandatory for applicable product categories
GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 60950-1)
GB 8898 — Safety requirements for audio, video and similar electronic apparatus (aligned with IEC 60065)
China electrical supply: 220 V AC / 50 Hz (same as Timor-Leste)
GB 2099.1 — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes (China domestic standard)

gap.en: The voltage and frequency (220–240 V / 50 Hz) are compatible between China and Timor-Leste — devices rated for 220–240 V will operate correctly. However: (1) Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by ANACOM; IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories are required for the ANACOM type approval technical file. (2) Plug type compatibility is mixed — Chinese Type I (GB 2099.1) plugs are mechanically compatible with Timor-Leste Type I sockets; Type C (Europlug) is also common in Timor-Leste. Products with Chinese Type A plugs (two flat parallel pins) will not fit Timor-Leste sockets without an adapter. (3) There is no dedicated Timorese electrical safety mark — compliance is evidenced through IEC test reports in the ANACOM type approval technical file.
gap.zh: 中国与东帝汶的电压和频率（220–240 V / 50 Hz）兼容——额定220–240 V的设备可正常运行。但：（1）中国CCC电气安全认证不被ANACOM承认；ANACOM型号认证技术文件需要ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1测试报告。（2）插头类型兼容性不一——中国I型插头（GB 2099.1）与东帝汶I型插座机械兼容；C型（欧式插头）在东帝汶也很常见。中国A型插头（两个扁平平行插脚）产品不带适配器无法插入东帝汶插座。（3）东帝汶没有专门的电气安全标志——合规性通过ANACOM型号认证技术文件中的IEC测试报告证明。
gap.zht: 中國與東帝汶的電壓和頻率（220–240 V / 50 Hz）相容——額定220–240 V的裝置可正常運行。但：（1）中國CCC電氣安全認證不被ANACOM承認；ANACOM型號認證技術文件需要ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1測試報告。（2）插頭類型相容性不一——中國I型插頭（GB 2099.1）與東帝汶I型插座機械相容；C型（歐式插頭）在東帝汶也很常見。中國A型插頭（兩個扁平平行插腳）產品不帶轉接頭無法插入東帝汶插座。（3）東帝汶沒有專門的電氣安全標誌——合規性通過ANACOM型號認證技術文件中的IEC測試報告證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1) electrical safety test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories required as part of ANACOM type approval technical file for devices with AC power supplies; 220–240 V / 50 Hz compatibility required; CCC not accepted
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4943.1 for applicable product categories with AC mains connections; 220 V / 50 Hz domestic supply

source.publisher: ANACOM — Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações, Timor-Leste

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Timor-Leste uses 220–240 V AC / 50 Hz — voltage and frequency are compatible with China-made devices rated for 220–240 V. Type C (European) and Type I (Australian) plugs are both common; Chinese Type I plugs are mechanically compatible. Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by ANACOM. IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories are required as part of the ANACOM type approval technical file. There is no separate Timorese electrical safety mark.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 东帝汶使用220–240 V交流电/50 Hz——与额定220–240 V的中国产设备电压和频率兼容。C型（欧式）和I型（澳大利亚式）插头均常见；中国I型插头与东帝汶插座机械兼容。中国CCC电气安全认证不被ANACOM承认。ANACOM型号认证技术文件需要ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1测试报告。东帝汶没有单独的电气安全标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 東帝汶使用220–240 V交流電/50 Hz——與額定220–240 V的中國產裝置電壓和頻率相容。C型（歐式）和I型（澳大利亞式）插頭均常見；中國I型插頭與東帝汶插座機械相容。中國CCC電氣安全認證不被ANACOM承認。ANACOM型號認證技術文件需要ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1測試報告。東帝汶沒有單獨的電氣安全標誌。
